name: socratic
description: The Socratic-Feynman method as a Claude Code plugin. Three commands: /socratic:ask grills the user one question at a time; /socratic:think self-grills with one user review checkpoint; /socratic:feynman runs a teaching-mode synthesis pass over a prior session or a clearly marked cold draft, surfaces gaps interactively, and writes a human-readable conclusion.html. ASK/THINK share a two-axis critic gate (Paul/Elder × six quality criteria) and a two-pass synthesis (§1–§9 audit + §0 SCQA Feynman Synthesis with Toulmin warrants).
